base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_gomeramos_king — a character (final_boss) from 1987 contra. Stage 8 final-boss Gomeramos King — alien-heart queen with multiple phases: heart-pulse. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage 8 final-boss Gomeramos King — alien-heart queen with multiple phases: heart-pulse → spawning face-huggers → final explosion. Iconic Contra finale
